identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a government system that feels like a fintech tool. Trustworthy, efficient, and aesthetically superior to standard public sector software.
principles: Content is King: Data clarity above all
Negative Space: Breathing room for complex forms

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, KPI values

mono.usage: Codes (CATMAT/CATSER), IDs, Financial values in tables

rules: Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for headings above 24px.
Use wide tracking (tracking-wide) for uppercase labels.

grid_system.form: Single Column Mobile, Two Column Desktop (max-w-3xl)

cards.style: Flat with subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover lifts slightly.
cards.classes: bg-card border border-border/60 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

tables.style: Fintech Precision. Sticky headers, dense rows.

images.description: Abstract blue/green geometric shapes, professional and modern.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px for elegance, 2px for active states.

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic gradients, no centered text blocks without purpose.
Dark Mode Strategy: Use 'Slate' grays, never pure black.
Micro-Interactions: Every button click, hover, and focus must have visual feedback.
Accessibility: Ensure WCAG AA contrast. Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
Glassmorphism: Use sparingly (headers, toasts) with backdrop-blur-md.
No 'Teal' for primary actions. Use the defined Emerald or Sky blue.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install dependencies: `npm install @fontsource/manrope @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans @fontsource/jetbrains-mono lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge`
2. Configure Tailwind: Update `tailwind.config.js` with the 'Glass Citadel' palette and fonts.
3. Create Layouts: Build the 'DashboardLayout' with a sidebar and the 'AuthLayout' with the abstract background.
4. Build Components: Customize Shadcn components (Card, Table, Button, Input) to match the guidelines.
5. Implement Pages: Login, Dashboard (with Bento grid), PAC List, PAC Editor (Form + Table).
6. Add Polish: Add 'sonner' for toasts, loading states, and empty states using the provided images.
